{{Sequel Disambiguation}}{{Card Infobox|Wish||2|}}{{Keyword Infobox|Exhaust|2}}{{Keyword Infobox|Retain|2}}
{{C|Wish||2}} is a 0 {{Icon|CE|2}} cost {{QueryLink|Cards|color:Colorless|Colorless|2}} {{QueryLink|Cards|rarity:Ancient|Ancient|2}} {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Skill|Skill|2}} Card. It allows you to choose 1 card from your Draw Pile to place into your Hand, after which it {{KW|Exhaust|Exhausts|2}}. If upgraded, it has {{KW|Retain||2}}, meaning it will not be discarded when you end your turn.

== Obtaining Wish ==
3 {{C|Wish|Wishes|2}} can be obtained by taking {{R|Sere Talon||2}} from {{KW|Vakuu||2}}'s offering at the start of [[StS2:Acts#Act 3|Act 3]], also obtaining 2 random {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Curse|Curses|2}}.
*The {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Curse|Curses|2}} added will never include {{C|Ascender's Bane||2}}, {{C|Bad Luck||2}}, {{C|Curse of the Bell||2}}, {{C|Enthralled||2}}, {{C|Folly||2}}, {{C|Greed||2}}, {{C|Poor Sleep||2}}, or {{C|Spore Mind||2}}.

== Update History ==
*'''Early Access v0.98'''
**Added Wish to the game.
